final:
module RefModule (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire we, // write enable  
    input wire [15:0] data_in,  
    output reg [15:0] data_out  
);  
    reg [15:0] unused_memory; // 16-bit unused_memory cell  

    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        if (we) begin  
            unused_memory <= data_in; // Write data when we is high  
        end  
        data_out <= unused_memory; // Always output current unused_memory value  
    end  
endmodule
